## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New module
- [ ] Enhancement to existing module
- [ ] Documentation / tests only
- [ ] CI / build tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint:check` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] New/changed behaviour covered by tests
- [ ] TSDoc updated if public API changed
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` entry added under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] `README.md` updated if a new module was added
- [ ] Exported from `src/index.ts` if new module
